title: Giygascraft
description: A mod themed around EarthBound's final boss: Giygas. Go on a red and dark adventure in a new biome: the giygas biome.
body:
# Description
Giygascraft is a 1.20.1 Minecraft mod for FML (Forge Mod Loader) themed around Giygas, the final boss of EarthBound. It might be ported to newer versions, but it is not confirmed yet.
# Current Available Languages
English, Portuguese
# FAQ
_Can I include this in my modpack?_ Yup.
_What license does this mod use?_ All Rights Reserved.
# Features
Features based on Giygas, the last EarthBound boss like a block, a new biome and more!
